de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.assumptions

Interface TranslationListener

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    DefaultTacletSetTranslation

    public interface TranslationListener
    Listener for the classes which implement TacletTranslator. Use this interface to get information while translating a taclet.

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void eventFormulaSV(SchemaVariable formula)
      Called when the translator finds a schema variable of type formula.
      boolean eventInstantiationFailure(GenericSort dest, Sort sort, Taclet t, Term term)
      Called when the translator can not instantiate a generic sort with a particular sort in the given term.
      void eventQuantifiedVariable(QuantifiableVariable var)
      Called when the translator finds a term that has a quantified variable.
      void eventSort(Sort sort)
      Called when the translator finds a term that have a sort.

    • Method Detail

      • eventSort

        void eventSort(Sort sort)
        Called when the translator finds a term that have a sort. You can use this event to collect all sorts that are used.
        Parameters:
        sort - the sort that has been found.

      • eventQuantifiedVariable

        void eventQuantifiedVariable(QuantifiableVariable var)
        Called when the translator finds a term that has a quantified variable. You can use this event to collect all quantified variables that are used.
        Parameters:
        var - the quantified variable that has been found.

      • eventFormulaSV

        void eventFormulaSV(SchemaVariable formula)
        Called when the translator finds a schema variable of type formula. You can use this event to collect all schema variables of type formula that are used.
        Parameters:
        formula -

      • eventInstantiationFailure

        boolean eventInstantiationFailure(GenericSort dest,
                                Sort sort,
                                Taclet t,
                                Term term)
        Called when the translator can not instantiate a generic sort with a particular sort in the given term. The result type determines whether the translation is aborted: The idea is, to make the translation robust against invalid instantiation.
        Parameters:
        dest - the generic sort to instantiate
        sort - the instantiation sort.
        t - the taclet thats belongs to the term
        term - the term to be instantiated
        Returns:
        return true if you want to terminate the translation of the taclet, otherwise false.
